citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: In supervised learning the model is trained on a training set to produce the correct labels for labeled data. In unsupervised learning, the model is trained to assign each input to a cluster of similar inputs.
